kennelTipLean.note: The Kennel's in full doom mode after the Cowboys debacle. A few delusional optimists tipping Dogs by 100+ but most reckon the Dolphins roll us at Suncorp.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: you underestimate the talent of the dogs, dogs 100 plus

debates.question: Salmon's named at 13 again — does he survive the full 80?
debates.kennel: The gameday thread is unanimous: 'just get salmon out of the starting line up please bare minimum'.

options.label: Starts but bench cameo only in second half

debates.question: Where does the Dogs' first try come from?
debates.kennel: Galvin scored our opener last week and the forum reckons he's the only attacking spark we've got.

options.label: Right edge — Crichton or Xerri finish
Forward crash ball under the sticks

trivia.question: What year did the Bulldogs win their most recent NRL premiership?
trivia.explainer: The Dogs beat the Roosters 16-13 in the 2004 Grand Final — still the last time we tasted it.

recap.question: Who racked up the most run metres for the Dogs against the Cowboys?
recap.explainer: Sua led the Dogs with 183 run metres — and he's just signed with the Bears for four years.

washup.headline: Cooked by the Cowboys and the fanbase has had enough.
washup.vibe: 12-28 at home and we leaked four tries in the last 28 minutes. Galvin scored the opener and was the only one with a pulse. The Kennel's gone full nuclear — sack threads, recruitment threads, and Sua signing with Perth on the way out the door. Off to Suncorp now to face a Dolphins side that should have us by double digits.
washup.kennelSummary: The fanbase is done — Ciraldo sack threads have ballooned past 900 replies, Gus is copping it for the roster, and losing Sua to the Bears poured petrol on the fire. The general feeling is the whole roster is lopsided, we've got no hooker, no fullback, and three centres on rep money.

kennelHotTakes.quote: Five years as GM and we enter a so-called premiership window with no 9, no 1 and no speed at all. There should be absolute guns coming through by now — all we have is Preston.
kennelHotTakes.author: liljohny

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Rnd 10 Vs Dolphins Thurs 7:50pm @ Suncorp
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Gameday thread is half team-tinkering (everyone's begging for Salmon out of the starting 13) and half wild-eyed Crittaraisemykids tipping the Dogs by 100. No1bulldog reckons Ciro won't change a thing despite all the noise.

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Early whispers
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Issa87 dropped a wild rumour about Burton shifting to lock, Crichton to fullback, Tracey to wing and Chan Kum Tong debuting. Everyone else is calling Chinese whispers and saying Burton at lock would be career suicide.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Ciraldo should be sacked tonight
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: AlzzBulldog losing it over Ciro shifting Galvin to centre while up 6, calling it sabotage. Liljohny's pivoted to having a crack at Gus too — five years in and still no 9, no 1, no speed.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Sua to Perth 4 yr deal
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Sua confirmed to the Bears and the thread is fuming — the kid outplayed half our backs and we let him walk while keeping 'Floptoya'. Frank Charles blaming Ciro's rotating bench for chasing him out.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Recruitment
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Roster construction getting roasted — $2.5m on three centres, 800k for a 6 playing 7, and zero NRL hookers. Marlinfeeder reckons the Roosters' 1-13 beats ours in every single position.
